context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Highest happiness state (90+), unlocked at relationship level 4
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60, on perch at y=80
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when happiness >= 90 and relationship level >= 4, autonomous behavior showing maximum contentment

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with crest fully raised, beak open, body upright and proud
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art with organic hand-drawn feel, no gradients
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on crest, beak, and body silhouette

animation.description: Frame 1-2: beak opens, crest raises, Frame 3-4: beak wide open, head tilts up, Frame 5-6: beak closes slightly, Frame 7-8: beak opens again, cycle repeats

visual_specification.details: Crest fully raised adding 6px to height, beak opens to 3px gap showing interior (#1D2B53), eyes wide open and bright (2x2px), body posture upright and extended, chest puffed out by 1-2px, tail feathers fanned, overall impression of joyful vocalization

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_happy (beak open vs closed), echo_idle (crest and posture), all other states (highest positive emotional expression)

explicit_negations: No visible sound waves (handled by note particles)
No color changes or glowing effects
No dancing or jumping (stays on perch)
No continuous loop without happiness requirement
No visible throat vibration or movement
